text.title: Trade-off Decision Methods Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure applying the trade-off-decision-methods methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: default-to-matrix
step.action: If matrix sufficient (≤2 attributes, low uncertainty, single-team) — apply matrix and stop.

step.name: escalate-by-signal
step.action: Detect signals: multi-attribute conflict → ATAM; time-driven → CoD; strategic → Wardley; high-uncertainty → Real Options.

step.name: produce-artefact
step.action: Run the method; emit its native artefact (matrix file / ATAM report / Wardley map / CoD calc / RO brief).

step.name: emit-adr
step.action: Compose ADR with method + rationale + artefact link + review trigger.
